software_engineer.summary: Software Engineer with X years of experience in full-stack development. Proficient in building robust back-ends with {{primary_stack}} and dynamic front-ends using TypeScript and React. Experienced with Relational and NoSQL databases, RESTful API design, and cloud deployments with automated CI/CD pipelines.
